data.title: Customer Obsession
data.description: Amazon's emphasis on providing the best customer experience.

data.title: Innovation Culture
data.description: Commitment to continual innovation across services and products.
data.technical_spec: Investment in R&D, adoption of new technologies.

data.title: Operational Efficiency
data.description: Streamlining operations to improve service delivery and cost-effectiveness.
data.technical_spec: Warehousing and logistics optimization, lean practices.

data.title: Broad Selection
data.description: Offering the widest possible variety of products to customers.
data.technical_spec: Expansive product catalog, partnerships with numerous vendors.

data.title: Leadership Principles
data.description: Guiding principles that shape Amazon's corporate culture and decision-making.
data.technical_spec: Guidelines such as 'Think Big', 'Invent and Simplify'.
